omitted_declarations.policy_reference: | User data: It is data that you store on TeraBox, such as files, documents, photos, videos, and audio ("user data"). | We may store, process, and transfer user data and relevant information to ensure proper operations for the Services and enable you to collaborate with others and work across devices and Services. User data includes the information, size, upload date and time, and usage of your configuration files. |
